revisionDesc.change: improvements to markup; change log, quotes, etc.
Hookified
converted to EpiDoc
moving Greg's work-in-progress on CTS-izing greco-roman collection texts to a Work directory
tagging now should be compatible with CTS

Changed the bibliographic information in the headers to reflect Francesco's discovery that the Greek text for these files was taken from the two-volume public domain Loeb version edited by Francis Storr.
adding rend=displayNum to lb tags
LB milestones instead of L tags
ADD tags for lt/gt entities DEL tags for lsqb/rsqb entities
base files for SDL
moved more xml files around based on copyright status
removed stray item tags
Converted to XML
added card 1s
Updated texts to TEI P4 and Perseus P4 extensions; minor cleanup (esp. character encodings and typos.)
remove spurious headers
Added separate funder entity to TEI header.

use n attribute on sp element to carry over the speaker name when the speech is interrupted by a card break; this also requires that the card break at the end come after the close of the sp, not within
fix misspelled title
Bring remaining files up to new DTD; use part=i and part=f for antilabe in all files
Markup.
Added speaker tags where they were missing.
Check text against TLG Sophocles in order to discover if there are any missing whole words or lines..
Revise DTDs and recheck texts.
Final check of cardbreaks, tags, and linenumbers.

change.who: EM, Scott Ettinger and Roger Travis

revisionDesc.change: tagging Text scanned at U. Chicago in 1988. Basic SGML tagging by EM, Scott Ettinger and Roger Travis.
